snort_rules.rule_text: alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: Cisco IMC auth bypass vulnerability allows attackers to alte"; content:"CVE-2026-20093"; nocase; sid:4188539; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)

alert tcp $HOME_NET any -> $EXTERNAL_NET any (msg:"CDB SENTINEL APEX: CVE-2025-7024 - Local privilege escalation in Windows Server"; content:"CVE-2025-7024"; nocase; sid:6065542; rev:1; classtype:trojan-activity; reference:url,intel.cyberdudebivash.com;)
